examples: There was no hilarity in the little town that same tranquil Saturday afternoon.

If you've never seen "The Threepenny Opera" before, its hilarity may surprise you.
But, contrasting the hilarity and absurdity of Festivus, there is some logic to be gleaned from Takanakuy.
Viral videos gain hilarity through the accumulation of those mistakes, often trivial in themselves.
